facts.primaryTitle: The Children Asked to Come Inside
facts.setting: Two children stood outside Noah's motel room in freezing rain.
criticalEvents: Two children stood outside Noah's motel room in freezing rain.
Noah Price was a travelling paramedic when the story began in a remote roadside motel during a winter storm.
facts.threat: Two children stood outside Noah's motel room in freezing rain.
facts.primaryReveal: The final warning is therefore simple: when the same impossible detail appears twice, do not wait for a third occurrence to prove that it is real.
facts.finalConsequence: The final warning is therefore simple: when the same impossible detail appears twice, do not wait for a third occurrence to prove that it is real.
facts.unresolvedQuestion: Did Noah Price defeat the thing at the centre of the story, or did the encounter simply teach it how to remain hidden?
